docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-18-2015 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,005.41 FILED BY MUNTHER, QUTAMI DBA ORIENT AUTO REPAIR AND DETAIL AS TO DEFENDANT COLE, RICK DBA ABC AUTO PARTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-18-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($60.00 FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED FEB-21-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT COLE, RICK DBA ABC AUTO PARTS
SUBPOENA RETURNED AND FILED (ISSUED TO:JAVIER BATRES ON FEB-27-2015)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE ROBERT SHEPPARD FILED BY MUNTHER, QUTAMI DBA ORIENT AUTO REPAIR AND DETAIL COLE, RICK DBA ABC AUTO PARTS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT COLE, RICK DBA ABC AUTO PARTS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT MUNTHER, QUTAMI DBA ORIENT AUTO REPAIR AND DETAIL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COPYING FEES (6 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF MUNTHER, QUTAMI DBA ORIENT AUTO REPAIR AND DETAIL

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $431.00 FILED BY COLE, RICK DBA ABC AUTO PARTS AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT MUNTHER, QUTAMI DBA ORIENT AUTO REPAIR AND DETAIL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-18-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-18-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-18-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: ROBERT SHEPPARD. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. BOTH PARTIES STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM HEARING THE CASE. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERKS: M.JONES/S.VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT JAVIER BATRES (INDIVIDUALLY) WAS SERVED AND IS NOT A PARTY TO THE ACTION SERVED FEB-27-1920, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT MUNTHER, QUTAMI DBA ORIENT AUTO REPAIR AND DETAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MUNTHER, QUTAMI DBA ORIENT AUTO REPAIR AND DETAIL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT COLE, RICK DBA ABC AUTO PARTS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO JAVIER BATRES

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-18-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-18-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: ROBERT SHEPPARD. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. BOTH PARTIES STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM HEARING THE CASE. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERKS: M.JONES/S.VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
